title: Undeferred Unlock
body:
https://github.com/projectatomic/libpod/blob/7965bf54048044d63f967d2b4ce8efe1e1072f05/libpod/pod.go#L81

This line seems as though the unlocking should be deferred. Would there be any reason to grab a lock and immediately release it?

comments.body: Yes this should be a defer
